name: Neo Galaxy-Eyes Photon Dragon
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>超銀河眼の光子龍</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ネオ・ギャラクシーアイズ・フォトン・ドラゴン</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc:
3 Level 8 monsters
If this card is Xyz Summoned using "Galaxy-Eyes Photon Dragon" as any of its materials: Negate the effects of all other face-up cards currently on the field. Once per turn: You can detach 1 material from this card; detach all materials from monsters your opponent controls, then this card gains 500 ATK for each, also it can attack up to that many times during each Battle Phase this turn.
mnst_eff:
3 Level 8 monsters
If this card is Xyz Summoned using "Galaxy-Eyes Photon Dragon" as any of its materials: Negate the effects of all other face-up cards currently on the field. Once per turn: You can detach 1 material from this card; detach all materials from monsters your opponent controls, then this card gains 500 ATK for each, also it can attack up to that many times during each Battle Phase this turn.
eff:
3 Level 8 monsters
If this card is Xyz Summoned using "Galaxy-Eyes Photon Dragon" as any of its materials: Negate the effects of all other face-up cards currently on the field. Once per turn: You can detach 1 material from this card; detach all materials from monsters your opponent controls, then this card gains 500 ATK for each, also it can attack up to that many times during each Battle Phase this turn.

action: Applies effects if Xyz Summoned using specific Xyz Material
Detaches multiple Xyz Materials for effect
mst: Negates the effects of Effect Monsters
Negates the effects of Spell Cards
Negates the effects of Trap Cards
summoning: Does not require specific Xyz Materials
